---
title: "Subscribe"
description: "Subscribe to receive updates about my new blog posts, projects, and research."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - _includes/turnstile-head.html
---

## Stay Updated

Get notified when I publish new articles, share research notes, or release new projects. I promise not to spam you, and you can unsubscribe at any time.

```{=html}
<div class="ql-subscribe-container" style="max-width: 500px; margin: 2rem 0; padding: 2rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
  <p style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">Enter your email below to subscribe:</p>
  
  <input type="email" id="ql-subscribe-email" placeholder="your.email@example.com" style="width: 100%; padding: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 6px; box-sizing: border-box;" required>
  
  <div class="ql-turnstile-box" style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
    <div class="cf-turnstile" data-sitekey="0x4AAAAAACzZJprJ4npD9l7W" data-callback="qlOnTurnstileSuccess"></div>
    <input class="ql-turnstile-token" type="hidden" name="captchaToken" value="">
  </div>

  <button id="ql-subscribe-submit" class="ql-btn-primary" style="width: 100%;">Subscribe</button>
  <p id="ql-subscribe-status" class="ql-status-msg" style="margin-top: 1rem; text-align: center;"></p>
</div>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const submitBtn = document.getElementById("ql-subscribe-submit");
  const emailInput = document.getElementById("ql-subscribe-email");
  const statusEl = document.getElementById("ql-subscribe-status");

  submitBtn.addEventListener("click", async () => {
    const email = emailInput.value.trim();
    const token = window.__ql_turnstile_token;

    if (typeof SUPABASE_FUNCTIONS_URL === "undefined") {
      statusEl.textContent = "Subscription service is not configured yet.";
      statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg ql-error-text";
      return;
    }

    if (!email || !email.includes("@")) {
      statusEl.textContent = "Please enter a valid email address.";
      statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg ql-error-text";
      return;
    }
    if (!token) {
      statusEl.textContent = "Please complete the captcha.";
      statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg ql-error-text";
      return;
    }

    submitBtn.disabled = true;
    statusEl.textContent = "Submitting...";
    statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg";

    try {
      // Use the global URL defined in turnstile-head.html
      const res = await fetch(`${SUPABASE_FUNCTIONS_URL}/subscribe`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ email, captchaToken: token })
      });
      
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok || !data.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Subscription failed");
      
      statusEl.textContent = "Successfully subscribed! Thank you.";
      statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg ql-success-text";
      emailInput.value = "";
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      statusEl.textContent = err.message || "Failed to subscribe. Please try again.";
      statusEl.className = "ql-status-msg ql-error-text";
    } finally {
      submitBtn.disabled = false;
    }
  });
});
</script>
```
